title: Respiratory
content: • Risk: Smoking is the main cause of COPD. : Long‑term smoke exposure damages bronchi and alveoli. • Risk: Gallstones are the most common cause of pancreatitis. : Stones block the pancreatic duct causing inflammation. • Risk: Hypertension is the biggest risk factor for stroke. : High pressure damages cerebral arteries leading to thrombosis. • Dx: Metformin is first‑line for type 2 diabetes. : It improves insulin sensitivity and reduces hepatic glucose output. • Risk: E coli is the most common UTI pathogen. : It originates from intestinal flora entering urinary tract.
